languages.text: "То есть Адептус Администратум стремятся повысить эффективность аграрных производств, одновременно с этим накладывая вето на исследование и санацию генетических отклонений местных флоры и фауны?" {n}Манипулус скептически приподнимает бровь.{/n} "Решение противоречиво на уровне базиса. Что тому виной, недостаток компетенций или намеренный саботаж?"

"So the Adeptus Administratum seeks to increase the efficiency of agricultural production, yet concurrently vetoes all research and remediation of genetic anomalies within the local flora and fauna?" {n}The Manipulus arches his eyebrow sceptically.{/n} "The decision is contradictory at its very foundation. What is to blame — a lack of competence, or deliberate sabotage?"
languages.original_text: "То есть Адептус Администратум стремятся повысить эффективность аграрных производств, одновременно с этим накладывая вето на исследование и санацию генетических отклонений местных флоры и фауны?" {n}Манипулус скептически приподнимает бровь.{/n} "Решение противоречиво на уровне базиса. Что тому виной, недостаток компетенций или намеренный саботаж?"

traits.locale_text: "So the Adeptus Administratum seeks to increase the efficiency of agricultural production, yet concurrently vetoes all research and remediation of genetic anomalies within the local flora and fauna?" {n}The Manipulus arches his eyebrow in skepticism.{/n} "The decision is contradictory at its very foundation. What is to blame — a lack of competence, or deliberate sabotage?"

"So the Adeptus Administratum seeks to increase the efficiency of agricultural production, yet concurrently vetoes all research and remediation of genetic anomalies within the local flora and fauna?" {n}The Manipulus arches his eyebrow in skepticism.{/n} "The decision is contradictory at its very foundation. What is to blame — a lack of competence, or deliberate sabotage?"

"So the Adeptus Administratum seeks to increase the efficiency of agricultural production, yet concurrently vetoes all research and remediation of genetic anomalies within the local flora and fauna?" {n}The Manipulus arches his eyebrow sceptically.{/n} "The decision is contradictory at its very foundation. What is to blame — a lack of competence, or deliberate sabotage?"

"So the Adeptus Administratum seeks to increase the efficiency of agricultural production, yet concurrently vetoes all research and remediation of genetic anomalies within the local flora and fauna?" {n}The Manipulus arches his eyebrow sceptically.{/n} "The decision is contradictory at its very foundation. What is to blame — a lack of competence, or deliberate sabotage?"

languages.text: «Entonces, ¿el Adeptus Administratum desea aumentar la eficacia de la producción agrícola, pero al mismo tiempo prohíbe toda investigación y remedio para las anomalías genéticas de la flora y fauna locales?». {n}El manipulus arquea la ceja, escéptico.{/n} «La decisión es contradictoria por sí misma. ¿Cuál es el origen? ¿Mera incompetencia o un sabotaje deliberado?».
languages.original_text: "So the Adeptus Administratum seeks to increase the efficiency of agricultural production, yet concurrently vetoes all research and remediation of genetic anomalies within the local flora and fauna?" {n}The Manipulus arches his eyebrow sceptically.{/n} "The decision is contradictory at its very foundation. What is to blame — a lack of competence, or deliberate sabotage?"

traits.locale_text: «Entonces, ¿el Adeptus Administratum desea aumentar la eficacia de la producción agrícola, pero al mismo tiempo prohíbe toda investigación y remedio para las anomalías genéticas de la flora y fauna locales?». {n}El manipulus arquea la ceja, escéptico.{/n} «La decisión es contradictoria por sí misma. ¿Cuál es el origen? ¿Mera incompetencia o un sabotaje deliberado?».

languages.text: “所以，帝国内政部一方面要求提高农业生产的效率，另一方面却否决了所有针对当地动植物基因异常的研究和治理措施？”{n}操纵者怀疑地挑起眉毛。{/n}“这个决定从根本上就是自相矛盾的。问题出在哪儿？是能力不足，还是故意捣乱？”
languages.original_text: "So the Adeptus Administratum seeks to increase the efficiency of agricultural production, yet concurrently vetoes all research and remediation of genetic anomalies within the local flora and fauna?" {n}The Manipulus arches his eyebrow sceptically.{/n} "The decision is contradictory at its very foundation. What is to blame — a lack of competence, or deliberate sabotage?"

traits.locale_text: “所以，帝国内政部一方面要求提高农业生产的效率，另一方面却否决了所有针对当地动植物基因异常的研究和治理措施？”{n}操纵者怀疑地挑起眉毛。{/n}“这个决定从根本上就是自相矛盾的。问题出在哪儿？是能力不足，还是故意捣乱？”

languages.text: "Das Adeptus Administratum will also die Effizienz der landwirtschaftlichen Produktion steigern, verbietet aber gleichzeitig jedwede Forschung und Korrektur genetischer Anomalien der örtlichen Flora und Fauna?" {n}Der Manipulus hebt skeptisch seine Augenbraue.{/n} "Die Entscheidung ist schon im Grundsatz widersprüchlich. Aber womit haben wir es zu tun ... mit Inkompetenz oder bewusster Sabotage?"
languages.original_text: "So the Adeptus Administratum seeks to increase the efficiency of agricultural production, yet concurrently vetoes all research and remediation of genetic anomalies within the local flora and fauna?" {n}The Manipulus arches his eyebrow sceptically.{/n} "The decision is contradictory at its very foundation. What is to blame — a lack of competence, or deliberate sabotage?"

traits.locale_text: "Das Adeptus Administratum will also die Effizienz der landwirtschaftlichen Produktion steigern, verbietet aber gleichzeitig jedwede Forschung und Korrektur genetischer Anomalien der örtlichen Flora und Fauna?" {n}Der Manipulus hebt skeptisch seine Augenbraue.{/n} "Die Entscheidung ist schon im Grundsatz widersprüchlich. Aber womit haben wir es zu tun ... mit Inkompetenz oder bewusster Sabotage?"

languages.text: « Or donc, l'Adeptus Administratum cherche à accroître la productivité agricole tout en interdisant les recherches et le traitement des anomalies génétiques décelées dans la flore et la faune locales ? » {n}Le manipulus hausse un sourcil d'un air sceptique.{/n} « Une décision dont les fondations mêmes sont contradictoires. Reste à savoir s'il s'agit d'un simple manque de compétences ou d'un sabotage délibéré... »
languages.original_text: "So the Adeptus Administratum seeks to increase the efficiency of agricultural production, yet concurrently vetoes all research and remediation of genetic anomalies within the local flora and fauna?" {n}The Manipulus arches his eyebrow sceptically.{/n} "The decision is contradictory at its very foundation. What is to blame — a lack of competence, or deliberate sabotage?"

traits.locale_text: « Or donc, l'Adeptus Administratum cherche à accroître la productivité agricole tout en interdisant les recherches et le traitement des anomalies génétiques décelées dans la flore et la faune locales ? » {n}Le manipulus hausse un sourcil d'un air sceptique.{/n} « Une décision dont les fondations mêmes sont contradictoires. Reste à savoir s'il s'agit d'un simple manque de compétences ou d'un sabotage délibéré... »

languages.text: "Yani Adeptus Administratum, tarımsal üretimin verimliliğini artırmayı amaçlıyor ancak aynı zamanda yerel flora ve faunadaki genetik anomalilerin tüm araştırmalarını ve iyileştirme çalışmalarını veto mu ediyor?" {n}Manipülus, şüpheyle kaşını kaldırıyor.{/n} "Bu karar temelde çelişkili. Suçlanması gereken şey ne... Yetkinlik eksikliği mi yoksa kasıtlı sabotaj mı?"
languages.original_text: "So the Adeptus Administratum seeks to increase the efficiency of agricultural production, yet concurrently vetoes all research and remediation of genetic anomalies within the local flora and fauna?" {n}The Manipulus arches his eyebrow sceptically.{/n} "The decision is contradictory at its very foundation. What is to blame — a lack of competence, or deliberate sabotage?"

traits.locale_text: "Yani Adeptus Administratum, tarımsal üretimin verimliliğini artırmayı amaçlıyor ancak aynı zamanda yerel flora ve faunadaki genetik anomalilerin tüm araştırmalarını ve iyileştirme çalışmalarını veto mu ediyor?" {n}Manipülus, şüpheyle kaşını kaldırıyor.{/n} "Bu karar temelde çelişkili. Suçlanması gereken şey ne... Yetkinlik eksikliği mi yoksa kasıtlı sabotaj mı?"

languages.text: 「アデプタ・アミニストラムは農業生産の効率化を図ろうとしているが、同時に、地元の動植物の遺伝的異常の研究や修復をすべて拒否しているのか？」{n}マニピュラスは眉をひそめて疑いの目を向ける。{/n}「その決定は根底から矛盾している。無能さか、それとも意図的な妨害か？」
languages.original_text: "So the Adeptus Administratum seeks to increase the efficiency of agricultural production, yet concurrently vetoes all research and remediation of genetic anomalies within the local flora and fauna?" {n}The Manipulus arches his eyebrow sceptically.{/n} "The decision is contradictory at its very foundation. What is to blame — a lack of competence, or deliberate sabotage?"

traits.locale_text: 「アデプタ・アミニストラムは農業生産の効率化を図ろうとしているが、同時に、地元の動植物の遺伝的異常の研究や修復をすべて拒否しているのか？」{n}マニピュラスは眉をひそめて疑いの目を向ける。{/n}「その決定は根底から矛盾している。無能さか、それとも意図的な妨害か？」
